name: testMoveMerchantAcquirerDownAndUpButtons
description: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority
descriptionHtml: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0909.214610.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select 'acquirer for gateway' acquirer MID within dialog
Select 'acquirer for gateway Movable' acquirer MID within dialog
Check that the first created acquirer priority is 0
Click 'Move business unit acquirer down' button
Check that the second created acquirer priority is 0 now
Click 'Move business unit acquirer up' button
Check that the first created acquirer priority is 0 again
